message:
fix(eval): make eval_expr_with_subqueries recursive for compound exprs (#88)

Previously only handled Subquery/Exists at top level, falling through to
eval_join_expr for BinaryOp/UnaryOp/Case/etc. This meant expressions
like `SELECT (SELECT MAX(x)) + 1` failed with "unsupported expression
type: Subquery". Now recursively evaluates BinaryOp, UnaryOp, IsNull,
Case, FunctionCall, Between, In, and Cast through the subquery-aware
path. Also adds 15 new conformance oracle tests (191 total).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
